title: Distance Traveled Calculation
description: A simple mod allowing to calculate the distance traveled over some amount of time.
body:
# Distance Traveled mod
**A simple mod to calculate the distance traveled over some time.**
**The mod calculates the distance every tick which ensures high accuracy**
## Usage:
To start mesuring the distance a player has traveled use:
```
/mstart
```
To stop mesuring and get the results use:
```
/mstop
```
### Supported versions:
- NeoForge 1.21.X
- Forge/NeoForge 1.20.1
- Forge 1.16.5
- Forge 1.14.4

<details>
<summary>Notice On Versions</summary>
I will update the mod as new versions of Mcreator get released and generators get Ported.


</details>
